message:
⚡ Memoize expensive reduce/filter chains in render body (#10875)

GPUInventoryHistory: extract inline .reduce() in JSX to a useMemo
(meanAllocatedGPUs). The chartData array was being reduced on every
render to compute the average GPU allocation.

OPAPolicies: consolidate 3 separate Object.values(statuses).filter()
chains (installedCount, totalViolations, inline policyCount reduce)
into a single useMemo that iterates the installed statuses once.

Note: ComplianceCards, IssueActivityChart, and the ConsoleOfflineDetection
filter chains were already memoized or inside event handlers — no changes
needed.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -578,10 +578,14 @@ Please: context: { clusterName } }) } - const installedCount = Object.values(statuses).filter(s => s.installed).length - const totalViolations = Object.values(statuses) - .filter(s => s.installed) - .reduce((sum, s) => sum + (s.violationCount || 0), 0) + const { installedCount, totalViolations, activePolicies } = useMemo(() => { + const installed = Object.values(statuses).filter(s => s.installed) + return { + installedCount: installed.length, + totalViolations: installed.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (s.violationCount || 0), 0), + activePolicies: installed.reduce((sum, s) => sum + (s.policyCount || 0), 0), + } + }, [statuses]) const handleShowViolations = (clusterName: string) => { setSelectedClusterForViolations(clusterName) @@ -708,7 +712,7 @@ Please:

Policies Active

- {Object.values(statuses).filter(s => s.installed).reduce((sum, s) => sum + (s.policyCount || 0), 0)} + {activePolicies}
